name: CIL Nova Petrochemicals Limited
summary: CIL Nova Petrochemicals Limited manufactures and sells yarns in India. The company offers partially oriented, micro-filament, draw twisted, texturized, and fully drawn yarns. It exports its products to Turkey, Spain, Italy, Germany, Peru, Tanzania, Brazil, Israel, France, Portugal, and the Middle East. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
